title: How Police Captured A Killer Soldier 7 Years Later

beats.description: Cold open reveals the victim's body discovery and hints at the husband's dark secret and escape.
Establishes Katie's final day, her disappearance, and the discovery of her body in an abandoned house.
Wayne Roer is interrogated as the prime suspect; the crime scene appears staged to frame him.
Sponsor segment and narrative bridge back to the investigation.
John's first interview where he calmly plants misdirection and defends Wayne to appear trustworthy.
Interviews with friends and family reinforce John's narrative until the niece reveals a financial motive.
Detectives wire the funeral home, successfully collect John's DNA, and spot him with 17-year-old Hannah.
Hannah and John face intense interrogations; cell phone pings contradict alibis, prompting John to flee.
Nationwide manhunt begins; abandoned vehicle and digital messages confirm premeditation.
Charles Scott's cellmate provides a detailed tip; detectives bluff about John's confession during interrogation.
Hannah returns to authorities, breaks under pressure, and reveals John's confession and their escape plan.
DNA confirms John's guilt, leading to a six-year manhunt, his eventual capture under an alias, and final convictions.
